label: offensive
rationale: 'most useless guy' - personal attack on politician Kalonzo, not ethnic.

label: neither
rationale: Political criticism of William (Ruto) using Kabogo's warning about Kiambu voters - electoral behavior, not ethnic contempt.

label: offensive
rationale: 'fake and gay' - US politics crude insult, not Kenyan ethnic context.

label: neither
rationale: Comparison between politicians Sifuna and Wetangula, unclear but no ethnic attack.

label: offensive
rationale: 'train wreck called Wamunyoro' - harsh personal insult of politician, not ethnic.

label: neither
rationale: Reports CS Ruku statement about ethnic bloc politics; discusses Mt Kenya/Meru coalition, no contempt expressed.

label: offensive
rationale: US Democrat party insult with Nazi/Communist symbols, not Kenyan ethnic context.

label: neither
rationale: Analysis of Kikuyu claims to Ol Kalou and political conflict over it, no ethnic contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kenyans may never allow the mediocrity of another Kikuyu president' - declares Kikuyu leadership categorically mediocre and unfit.

label: neither
rationale: Electoral bloc analysis: 'Impossible those 2 tribes will vote in the same direction' - voting pattern observation.

label: offensive
rationale: 'begging thief' directed at individual politician William Ruto, not ethnic.

label: offensive
rationale: 'mbwa wewe' (dog) - personal insult at Sifuna.

label: hate
rationale: '100% Kambas follow Kalonzo like senile sheep' - collective attribution of mindless following to entire ethnic community.

label: offensive
rationale: 'vinyangarika', 'twendawazimu', 'disgusting', 'eyesore' - insults aimed at named individuals Didmus and Salasya.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Kahaba, walevi na wajinga' (prostitutes, drunkards, fools) - generic insults not tied to protected characteristic.

label: offensive
rationale: 'gachagua atawafinya makende' - crude sexual insult at Gachagua supporters.

label: hate
rationale: 'Must have been either yamune or luo traffic police' - attributes corrupt behavior to specific ethnic groups.

label: hate
rationale: 'luhya + stomach is what they prefer...Give them food shida zao ziko sorted they don't need roads, good schools' - portrays community as shallow, easily bought with food.

label: neither
rationale: US political criticism of Democrat party racism claims, not Kenyan ethnic context.

label: offensive
rationale: 'very useless' aimed at named politicians who 'waliangusha waluhya'.

label: offensive
rationale: 'gachafua, tribal bigot' - personal insult at Gachagua.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Shenzi wewe' (uncivilized) directed at politician Kalonzo.

label: offensive
rationale: Mockery of Kikuyu for supporting Ruto then complaining - ridicule but closer to political hypocrisy critique than ethnic contempt.

label: neither
rationale: Electoral analysis: 'the rest of luyhas should learn from Bukusus' - intra-ethnic group political observation.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kales from South Rift...are always loyal to their own' - electoral bloc loyalty analysis, 'kata miti' is campaign slang.
